entry.title: Error in deploying artifact in BPA - (component Forms) - Unable to reach runtime server
entry.content:
Hi

I have downloaded a project from the BPA Store (Capital Expenditure Process)

I can release the project with no issues.

When I try and deploy the project I get the error

  • An error occurred while deploying an artifact to a runtime. (component: Forms)
    • Unable to reach runtime server

entry.title: Re: Report events on creation of a freight order in TM
entry.content: Nice! Alternatively you can use /scmtms/cl_tor_helper_event=>report_event

entry.title: Re: I'm trying to instal fiori apps but in the system cat...
entry.content:
It took me some time to understand but part of S4Hana installation was the installation of Front End Server Package and another package containing all Apps accordingly.

when updating to S4Hana the corresponding Fiori packages were not installed. after installing them, all apps are now available in the corresponding Catalogs.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) | Customer Roundtable | June 2025
entry.content:
It's been some time since the last CAP Customer & Partner Roundtable, so it's time for a new edition before our highlight of the year - re>≡CAP 2025 in July.

As always we will go for a mix of recent announcements, demo, presentations as well as topics and questions raised by the CAP community.

Do you have CAP related insights, requirements, issues, challenges, topics… that you would like to share and discuss in the upcoming meeting? If yes, please reach-out to us so that we can add it to the agenda.

 Agenda Draft (will be updated)

  1. Introduction
    • re>≡CAP 2025
    • CAP's new major release
    • ...
  2. Updates from CAP Team
    • tbd
  3. Q&A / Topics by the Community

Meeting Information

When: Wednesday, June 04th, 2024, 11 AM EST | 5 PM CE(S)T

Where: Teams Meeting

Meeting Request Download: link

Who:  

    • All interested partners and stakeholders are invited to join: developers, enterprise architects, technical consultants…
    • The SAP Cloud Application Programming Model team
    • Anyone interested in learning about the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model and exchange your ideas and feedback with other users and the product team

Looking forward to seeing you there!
Check also out the new Events page in our documentation and our Community page for updates on upcoming events.

entry.title: Re: Not able to Switch tabs in Tabstrip of MM02 when implementing additional custom subscreen.
entry.content:
@jatinder_jaswal : I am also facing the same issue. Tried the above suggested point - changing scon, but its not working, its giving dump. Dump is resolved when I am keeping Scon back to 4000. Need help on how to enable navigating between tabs from custom tab.
Did you get solution to this issue?

entry.title: Re: Revenue Recognition Key cannot be maintained for FOC...
entry.content:
Hello Annika,

Event-Based Revenue Recognition does not support the derivation of revenue recognition keys for Free of Charge item categories.

If this design does not align with your business scenario, please submit a CIP request and provide a detailed description of your requirement.

Best regards,

Petr

entry.title: Custom field addition in Migration objects Modeler (LTMOM) during S4 Hana Migration.
entry.content:
Introduction

In this blog, we'll explore a common scenario when working with LTMOM (Legacy Transfer Migration Object Modeler) in SAP, particularly when you encounter a custom field that doesn't exist in the target structure. This can be a challenge, especially when you need to enhance the BAPI (Business Application Programming Interface) to accommodate the new field. We’ll walk through the steps of adding the custom field to the target structure, updating the BAPI accordingly, and implementing the necessary logic to handle the field in the transfer process.

By the end of this blog, you'll have a clear understanding of how to extend your LTMOM configuration to support these custom fields seamlessly.

Understanding the Problem

Imagine you are tasked with transferring data from a legacy system to SAP. The legacy system has a custom field that’s critical for business operations, but this field doesn’t exist in the target structure in SAP. Without the custom field in the target structure, the data cannot be transferred correctly, and the business process may be impacted.

This is where LTMOM comes into play: it maps the data from the legacy system to the target SAP structure. But, if a custom field is missing in the target structure, it will be impossible to map it directly.

In this blog, we will look at how to enhance the target structure and update the BAPI so that it can handle the custom field for the project systems

Please note this blog is based on the project systems only.

Project system and DMC load

The migration of Project Header and Project Definition records from the legacy SAP ECC system to the new SAP S/4HANA environment will be a critical step.

This migration process requires a systematic and structured approach to ensure that all project-related data is accurately transferred and aligned with the new system’s requirements. The goal is to seamlessly upload the Project Header and Project Definition records into the SAP S/4HANA environment, enabling continuity in tracking and managing capital acquisition activities.

In the context of data migration to SAP S/4HANA, LTMC (Legacy Transfer Migration Cockpit) serves as the primary loading mechanism. LTMC simplifies the migration process by providing a user-friendly interface and predefined workflows for transferring data from legacy systems to SAP.

To facilitate this process, SAP offers standard DMC (Data Migration Cockpit) templates. These templates are designed to support the migration of various data objects, such as Project Headers, Project Definitions, and other master data, ensuring consistency and accuracy during the transfer.

However, while the standard DMC templates are highly effective for common data objects, they may need to be customized or extended to accommodate unique business requirements or custom fields. For example, if your legacy system includes custom fields that are critical for business processes, the standard template must be enhanced to include these fields.

Below is a screenshot of the standard DMC (Data Migration Cockpit) template, which is used for loading data into SAP using the LTMC:

Steps to Enhance BAPI 

 - we are working with the Project System object.

Fig_1: There are a total of 52 custom fields to be appended. For simplicity, only 5 of these fields are illustrated in the figure.

Fig_2: Go to transaction LTMOM (data migration modeler)

Fig_3: Add the custom fields to the Source structure

Fig_4: Map the source structure to the R_EXTENSION IN , Double click on the structure mapping and set splits

Fig_5: Set splits, which bring split field mapping inside field mapping (below next fig) 

Fig_6: Field mapping needs custom Event based Rule and Field mapping rules as detailed below which works on the internal table defined in global data

Fig_7: Global data

Fig_7: Custom Event Rule (for Start of record event)

Add the custom field to the input parameter and include these fields along with the main structure(S-project def) in Parameter value also give the description for each fields

Fig_8: Below code for this rule built as per Function module documentation on filling EXTENSIONIN parameter of BAPI_BUS2001_CREATE 

DATA lr_ci_proj_bapi_ext TYPE REF TO bapi_project_definition_ext.

DATA lo_bapi_mapping     TYPE REF TO if_cfd_bapi_mapping.

DATA ls_ci_proj          TYPE ci_proj.

CASE _split_no.

  WHEN '0001'.

    CLEAR gt_bapiparex.

    lo_bapi_mapping = cl_cfd_bapi_mapping=>get_instance( ).

    CREATE DATA lr_ci_proj_bapi_ext.

    lr_ci_proj_bapi_ext->key = project_defn.

    lr_ci_proj_bapi_ext->data-zzlev_code = zzlev_code.

    lr_ci_proj_bapi_ext->data-zzscode_1  = zzscode_1.

"--REPEAT SIMILAR LINES FOR ALL CUSTOM FIELDS HERE--"

    lr_ci_proj_bapi_ext->data-zzfinstdt = zzfinstdt.

    TRY.

        lo_bapi_mapping->map_to_bapiparex_single(

          EXPORTING ir_source_structure = lr_ci_proj_bapi_ext

          CHANGING ct_bapiparex = gt_bapiparex[] ).

      CATCH cx_cfd_bapi_mapping.

    ENDTRY.

    IF gt_bapiparex IS INITIAL.

      skip_record.

    ENDIF.

 

  WHEN OTHERS.

    IF lines( gt_bapiparex ) < _split_no.

      skip_record.

    ENDIF.

ENDCASE.

Fig_9:  Custom field mapping rule used for mapping each split fields

Fig_10:  Give the parameter and parameter value as defined

Below is the code used for map fields of BAPIPAREX

DATA(lv_tabix) = CONV sytabix( row ).

IF lv_tabix <= lines( gt_bapiparex ).

  READ TABLE gt_bapiparex INTO DATA(ls_bapiparex) INDEX lv_tabix.

  IF sy-subrc = 0.

    ASSIGN COMPONENT fieldname OF STRUCTURE ls_bapiparex

    TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_bapi_parex>).

    IF sy-subrc EQ 0.

      fieldvalue = <fs_bapi_parex>.

    ENDIF.

  ENDIF.

ENDIF.

Note: Limit length of custom rules to 20(actual limit is total of Project & rule names = 40)

Fig_11: Go back and click on the icon to regenerate the object with the custom changes in order to include the custom fields in the DMC source template.

Fig_12: The DMC source template for the project system, including the custom fields And the DMC load.

Fig_12: The SAP table containing custom fields data.

Our references:

  1.  Adding custom fields to SAP HANA - Example material master

entry.title: Re: SLD Data Supplier to to SAP's Support Backbone, for A...
entry.content:
Good Morning,

Thanks for you late answer Vera_Jiang.

As there is no possible way to handle this basic functionality with SAP AS Java tools, I have set a reverse proxy to solve the issue: AS Java -> Reverse Proxy (FQDN=sld.mydomain) -> supply.landscape.services.sap

For the one who may want to solve this issue.
This is a basic apache reverse proxy configuration that could be use for domain xxx.

<VirtualHost *:80>
ServerName sld.xxx

SSLProxyEngine On
SSLProxyCheckPeerName off
AllowEncodedSlashes On

ProxyPass / https://supply.landscape.services.sap/ nocanon
</VirtualHost>

On the Java AS, you need to configure:
NWA -> Configuration -> Infrastucture -> Destinations -> SLD_DataSupplier -> Edit
---
URL : http://sld.xxx/sld/ds
System ID: EMPTY
Client : EMPTY
Language : EMPTY
IgnoreSSL: Selected
User Name: SUser for SLD Update
Password : PAssword of the SUser
---

In case your network between your servers is not secure, you can make it work with https used between the AS Java and the Reverse Proxy. But you need to import SSL certificate of the sld.xxx in the AS Java Trust Store.

Have a nice day.

entry.title: How to Suppress SAP Standard Message from the Message Class MM_PUR_SRCGPROJ. Way to Disable message
entry.content: We have a condition where we do not need the error message appearing on Standard UI Application. The message is a Standard Message from the class MM_PUR_SRCGPROJ. Need help to suppress the message.

entry.title: Reporting on Employee's Annualized Salary on compensation info.
entry.content:
Hello SuccessFactors Champions,
I have been trying to run an accurate report on employee's annualized Salary on Comp info, which is a transient field and have not yet succeeded in doing so and hence reach out to you all for your guidance and support. 
We have many countries involved with over 100 pay components composing the pay component group Annualized Salary. Hence, we are unable to do a canvas report with calculations for the same.
And the Table report for PayComponent Group Sum does not reflect correct Annualized Salary values for certain countries and also when FTE is not equal to 1. 

I would be grateful for any advice where you have achieved a simpler way of reporting Annualized Salary accurately. 

Looking forward for your assistance. 

Thanks & Regards!

entry.title: Re: Using building block inside fragment fails in Fiori E...
entry.content: this.base.getExtensionAPI().loadFragment

entry.title: Re: How to identify Login user as Manager in Add new Empl...
entry.content:
Hi @karthik1gobburu 

 

Let me know if I understand what you need?

You need to identify the manager when he do a change and, if them so you shows an alert message, rght?

If yes, you can user this function to do it:

It means that when the login user (or current user depending of your scenery) be in a specific "Manager Permission Group", the system will trigger your message.

Note that 1) you need to define the correct scenery for your requirement to obtain the expected behavior, 2) on your printscreen you shows the "Basic Scenery", please note that this scenery will be depreciate by SAP, so it is not recommended to use it on your rules.

I hope that this could helped you.

 

Best Regards,

JC

entry.title: Re: When Customer become Prisonner of SAP Ariba Support
entry.content: What you describe here is a story I have heard from so many customers using ARIBA in my network or SAP events. I have discussed it as well extensively with SAP representatives in the past. Unfortunately, there is no magic solution here.... The origin of this is a combination of a lot of different factors under the responsibility of different teams on SAP side and due, as you said, of their silo-ted organization : - feature are released in a MVP version that needs generally refinement afterwards to be really use-able and EFFICIENT. Unfortunatly, those phases of refinement after MVP state rarely happen or way too late (years after). - Most of the time, those missing refinements can be considered as "bugs" by us customer when in fact it is a "design" bug and not a "technical" bug: the feature is working as designed technically but the design has some flaws/issues that make it un-useable. So it is not what support is calling a bug and generally they will ask you to create a customer influence (CI) which make sense in theory but in reality not working due to the CI process (see next point) - The CI platform is generally the way that SAP wants us customer to indicate any improvements in a existing design or propose new idea. And everything is based on customer voting for the different CI. Unfortunatly, not a lot of customers are playing the game and even the very fews playing it does not create enough vote for SAP to consider it or more importantly, generally the "design bugs" or existing flow improvements are not looked at because it is very limited in scope of customers using the flow involved in the CI... There is still some other issues more related to internal SAP: - because of their silo-ted organization, new features and new processes are not taking every aspect into account when the design is done (specifically integration with other SAP platforms) - Most probably the capacity of their internal engineer team is more focus on developping new functionalities than improving the existing ones out of the MVP state. So overall, the key is the customer influence aspect. If every customer was playing the CI game increasing the nb of votes, SAP would have no choice to listen more to this small but key improvements in existing processes...

entry.title: Re: Connect with SAP Community at SAP Sapphire and Share Your Special SAP Event Moment!
entry.content:
@keohanster - thanks for the memories!

@josh_bentley @StephanieMarley @antonia_zorn - nice initiative from Sue above that could be revived 😀 - 30 seconds to introduce yourself on video to SAP Community in some memorable ways - from @JimSpath !!

entry.title: Create a header with items in a single OData request from a Fiori app using XML annotations
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to create a Fiori application for purchase contracts with BAPI. I have an OData service with associations and a Fiori application with XML annotations. It works—I can see the header and the associated items on the object page in BAS. I am able to create new items, but only the header and items separately. I would like to create them using a single OData request, so I redefined get_expanded_entityset and create_deep_entity.

It works using the GW Client.

However, I cannot find any information on how to use this functionality in Fiori with XML annotations. Is it possible? How can I create a header with items in a single request?

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention IWS - 'AI in Sales and Distribution' (Virtual, June 5, 2025)
entry.content:
Virtual

June 5, 2025

Agenda

Dear Valued Customer,

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop focusing on “AI in Sales and Distribution” taking place virtually on June 5th, 2025. Please find the current agenda here.

The workshop will start with the session that explores the AI capabilities in SAP S/4HANA Sales and Distribution, powered by SAP HANA for Machine Learning (ML) and SAP Business Artificial Intelligence (AI). Gain insights into the latest trends and innovations in AI technologies that are revolutionizing the sales and distribution landscape.

Next, the workshop will provide a comprehensive overview of the Integrated Scenario Lifecycle Management (ISLM) framework, designed to support SAP S/4HANA embedded scenario Predicted Delivery Delay. Participants will explore this functionality and learn how to predict delivery delays and solve problems, enhancing logistics efficiency and customer satisfaction.

After that, discover the Situation Handling framework in SAP S/4HANA, designed to proactively manage and address specific business situations that require attention or intervention.

Additionally, experience the power of automation with SAP's Document Extraction Service, turning PDF documents into Sales Orders to accelerate processing times and reduce manual errors.

Finally, dive into the capabilities of Joule, SAP's artificial intelligence-driven tool, designed to enhance business decision-making and processes. Learn about its capabilities within the Sales and Distribution operations.

At the end, the workshop will present the comprehensive SAP MaxAttention service portfolio for AI, designed to support customers in exploring, innovating, and effectively implementing AI capabilities. The session will also highlight how customers can leverage the SAP MaxAttention methodology to develop their Custom AI solutions in collaboration with the SAP Custom Innovation Services organization.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

Important

Please note that the 'Attend' button which can be found within this blog post does not serve as a formal registration for the event.

To officially register, please reach out to me, paul.schropp@sap.com and I will ensure that your registration is properly processed.

We look forward to having you join us for our upcoming events and thank you for your understanding!

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: Re: Impacts on change Event Reasons during a transfer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

You can see the answer for this question here:

Case 543267/2025 - Change Event on Event Reason - SAP For Me

The impact of changing the 'return' event reason to be on the 'data change' event rather than the 'transfer' event will depend on your configuration and whether or not the 'transfer' event triggers the 'transfer' event in Intelligent Services.

From what I can see of our documentation, usually the 'Transfer' event is used to then trigger the business rule which triggers the 'Transfer' event in Intelligent Services, for job / position changes:

Transferring an Employee | SAP Help Portal

As such, if you are using this business rule and have it triggering when the 'transfer' and 'return' event reasons are used (or if it just checks that the event of the event reason being used is 'transfer'), then the 'return' event reason should be kept on the 'transfer' event so that it can continue to trigger this rule and the resulting 'Transfer' event in Intelligent Services. If you changed the 'return' event reason to 'data change' event and did not adjust the business rule accordingly, then it would no longer trigger the 'Transfer' event in Intelligent Services.

Additionally, while it should not have any real impact on employees who already have the event and event reason used, making such changes may cause issues down the line if you ever edit those employees' data with that event and event reason - Centralised Services has a big focus on data validation and data being correct, so if the event reason is moved from the old event, the system may trigger errors related to this down the line. As such, normally when customers want to make changes such as this, we would suggest that instead of moving the current 'return' event reason to 'data change' event, you should instead create a new event reason which can also be called 'return', and put it on the 'data change' event, and make the old 'return' event reason inactive so it remains configured correctly in the system and is just no longer usable, but can be turned back on at any time.

 

Best Regards,

JC

entry.title: Re: Scripting Tracker - Development Tool for SAP GUI Scripting

Anne

entry.title: invalid path for report file
entry.content:
Hello together,

we have a problem with sending PDFs files through Outlook. The first 2-3 times it works, but after we get an error "invalid path for report file". I know this happens when something happens to the file in the %temp% folder. But any idea why this happens so irregular? And why it happens the first times and just happend to stop working.

Kind regards,

Bastian Neuhoff

entry.title: How to stop retriggering of flexible workflow for purchase Order
entry.content:
in the current system, any change retriggers the flexible workflow especially Quantity,Please suggest a solution for this requirement. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to stop retriggering of flexible workflow for pur...
entry.content:
Refer the below KBA and there is field 'Total net value' in the SSCUi this will be considered when you make  changes to either quantity or Net price.

3053155 - Restart Purchase Order Workflow using SSCUI 103345 and BAdI MMPUR_PO_WORKFLOW_RESTART - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Model filter is missing single quotes to the substrin...
entry.content:
I am a bit late to the party but this exact problem happened to me before. It looks like a bug in the Filter constructor you are using: 

new sap.ui.model.Filter(sPath, sOperator, vValue1, vValue2);


Try using the one with an object as a parameter:

new Filter({
      path: "Price",
      operator: FilterOperator.BT,
      value1: 11.0,
      value2: 23.0
    });

entry.title: Receive Feed of SAP Security Notes
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need to stay up to date regarding SAP Security Notes (from here: https://me.sap.com/app/securitynotes).

However I dislike having to frequently check manually via the website.
My question: Is it possible to receive updates for existing nodes and new notes via an RSS feed or per email?

I've found that inside my personalization options I can choose to get notified by mail when an update occurs, however that applies only to single notes I marked "as favourites".

I would much appreciate a pointer to the functionality or community-built tooling, I imagine this is a frequent request.

An alternative feed for all new knowledge base notes that I need to filter down would work for me as well.

Best, Philipp

entry.title: Re: managed rap + unmanged save and bapi getting success...
entry.content: @MioYasutake Now I get it, you made my day.

entry.title: Re: Version Change in report writer report
entry.content: This answer talks about the functional version field (e.g. budget version), it's not related to the "Program Version" of Report Groups (tables T803V and T803VP).

entry.title: Re: How to delete or Change MIC version
entry.content: As far as I know you could use  transaction QS25

entry.title: Re: Where can I find learning materials for SAP CPQ concepts, features, and functionality.
entry.content: Thank you @katrin_elk for your help on making the videos play...

entry.title: Re: Proxy setup of CALM
entry.content: Thanks Paul.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community AI Conversation Chatbot to ask Q&A?
entry.content:
Hi @YashikaYTD - thank you for request. 

You're right that SAP Community is a vast knowledge repository with great potential for AI to make that content more accessible. While we’re actively exploring how to bring AI-powered experiences into the community, we’re not able to expose the data in such way as security, content governance, and quality controls are of utmost importance.

That said, we're excited about what’s possible and are taking thoughtful steps to shape the right approach.

I will add your idea/request to our new feedback list.

entry.title: RF verification profile in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I customize in the public Cloud the RF verification profile.

1. In goods receipt process, I set it with (source HU+ destination bin) but the system always want that I also verify the source bin. Even if I put nothing, it always want to verify the source and destination bin.

2. Is there a way to check only the source quantity or destination quantity? There is only 1 field Qty and it checks both.:

Thanks,

Emmanuel.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025
entry.content:
Hello @shigoto,

Thanks for your question. The support of Tomcat 10 is planned with the next SAP BusinessObjects BI 2027 (ETA, beginning of 2027). In the meantime, FYI:

  • we have integrated Tomcat 9.0.98 with BI 2025.
  • we plan to deliver Tomcat 9.0.104 with SAP BusinessObjects BI 4.3 SP05, BI 4.3 SP04 patch13 and the BI 2025 patch02.

entry.title: Re: workflow approver does not receive email notification
entry.content: thank you for your answer, I have a question, are system notifications sent only to business emails? for example, if we have an employee who has one primary email but it's a personal email, will he receive email notifications?

entry.title: Adapt UI Not Available to Hide 'Confirm All' Button in Starter System
entry.content:
Dear Support,


We have a configuration query within the starter customizing environment, within the Manage Service Orders application (F3571A) there is a button "confirm all" service orders and we want to gray out that button so it is not available, is there any way to achieve this?


Please see the screenshots in the attached file.


Regards,


PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Adapt UI Not Available to Hide 'Confirm All' Button i...
entry.content:
In the Starter Customizing Environment, it is not possible to disable or hide UI elements like the "Confirm All" button in the Manage Service Orders app (F3571A). This is because Adapt UI and other key user extensibility features are not supported in starter systems—they are demo systems meant for fit-to-standard exploration only.

If this functionality is required, you can perform it in a test or development tenant, where Adapt UI is available and enabled through the relevant business catalogs (SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_FLX_PC or SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_FLX_CUS_PC).

For further reference, see:

KBA 3096740 – “Adapt UI” button is missing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

KBA 2981323 – Extensibility for Service: Missing “Adapt UI” option

entry.title: Re: SAP CAPM Full Stack UI5 Application with CRUD Operations
entry.content:
Thanks for bringing end to end and detail steps of CAPM and really helped.

 

And also expecting more from you related to CAPM.

entry.title: Re: Version Change in report writer report
entry.content:
You cannot (and must not) change the Program Version of Report Groups (tables T803V and T803VP), it's automatically incremented during an import, as explained below.

The Program Version is automatically incremented when a new version of a report group is imported in a system. The transport of a report group is indicated by this entry:

R3TR TDAT GRW_JOB, with one table key T803J <client CHAR 3><report group CHAR 4> indicating the concerned report group.

The post-import function module is G_RW_AFTER_IMPORT which calls CL_GRW_TRANSPORT_UTIL. For a report group, it calls the method AFTER_IMPORT of the class CL_GRW_TRANSPORT_JOB, which calls the function module G_RW_PROGRAM_ACTIVE_VERSION.

G_RW_PROGRAM_ACTIVE_VERSION increments the program version; there is this comment in the code:

Active version must be always increased if extracts exist due to possible problems with dynamical sets (TVAL pointers in table COLUMNS)

entry.title: Data Mismatch Issue in SAP SuccessFactors Story Reports Due to Table Linking
entry.content:
Hello ! 

I’m encountering an issue with Story Reports in SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics. After creating the first table using a query, the design page displays the correct number of requisitions. However, when I add a second table that is linked to the first one, the number of requisitions shown decreases. I believe this drop is caused by the way the tables are linked, which is impacting the data unexpectedly. How can we resolve this and ensure the requisition counts remain accurate?
Thank you

entry.title: Re: When Customer become Prisonner of SAP Ariba Support
entry.content: I see Anand, the point is there was another customer who created an influence ticket and it was rejected due to lower votes. But how can we interact more with the CI process as @Francois-Xavier mentionned. Whn an influence ticket is created SAP doesnt sent a notification to the power user to review and vote. Then how people will know?

entry.title: Real Estate Management with SAP​ and Planon
entry.content:
Better together: How SAP Expands its Cloud ERP Portfolio through partnering​

Business partnerships are extensions to Cloud ERP processes that are key for companies of all sizes to increase speed of innovation and to become more resilient. Teaming up with our partners not only unlocks innovation but ultimately provides faster time-to-value for our customers and addresses critical capabilities as part of our SAP S/4HANA Cloud road map. The way to embed partners and collaborate with them has changed over time: today, many SAP partners leverage the SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) to create extensions to Cloud ERP processes and experiences for our customers.​

Combining the strengths of market-leading organizations like Planon and Schneider Electric with the expertise of SAP will provide significant business value and innovation to customers’ real estate business by holistically connecting buildings, people, and processes. The cloud ERP solution from SAP serves as the backbone for managing end-to-end business processes, together with Planon, the market leader for vertical real estate and facility management software, and Schneider Electric, a global specialist in energy management and automation for buildings.​

Customers will benefit from the data flowing from smart technologies seamlessly into ERP processes. This will unleash the potential of the huge amount of real estate-related data, creating new opportunities for optimization and value creation.​

The partnership with Planon follows a strategically aligned partnership approach which includes: ​

  • Strong product co-innovation and collaboration on roadmap and technology alignment to create integrated scenarios.​
  • Proven premium certification, where SAP’s validation increases customer confidence by providing the assurance of a fully tested, out-of-the-box, SAP-approved integration that meets all SAP product standards.​
  • Strong go-to-market collaboration with active co-selling, joint positioning, co-marketing, and executive sponsorship to bring the co-innovation to our customers.

Way forward ​

Planon Real Estate Management for SAP will have unique properties, with a jointly developed “out-of-the-box” integration with SAP S/4HANA as the most prominent one.​

The solution integration is based on a division of capabilities between SAP andPlanon. The key capabilities of both solutions are shared as following:​

Real Estate and Facility Management processes are supported in Planon, while related Finance processes are supported in SAP S/4HANA.

 

​

Planon and SAP are using an aligned data model based on the SAP One Domain Model (ODM). This enables ONE single point of truth for master data management.​

Real Estate Data includes:​

  • Architecture Objects​
  • Usable Objects (Accounting Responsibility)​
  • Rentable Objects​
  • Contracts​

Additional Master Data objects like Business Partners, Accounting Objects or Fixed Assets are also supported.​ 

The interaction of this joined data is shown in the following picture.​

Planon and SAP run the relevant processes on this joined data foundation and ensure a transactional process flow between both applications.​

The transaction integration is done via “jump offs” (Deep Links and Intent based Navigation),dedicated interfaces (FIBTI-Finance Business Transaction Interface) or integration flows of the SAP Cloud Integration Suite. 

Demo video​

The following video shows the interaction between Planon and SAP S/4HANA using a shopping mall as an example. The steps shown are:​

  • SAP Fiori launchpad in SAP S/4HANA and jump to Planon​
  • Planon Homepage with overviews​
  • Detailed view of the Paris Shopping Mall​
  • Occupancy and vacancy overview in 2D CAD drawing​
  • Detailed view of a rentable unit and direct jump off to SAP S/4HANA​
  • Lease-Out Contract in SAP S/4HANA​
  • Return to Planon to the detail view of the rentable unit​
  • Jump to rental contract in SAP S/4HANA for the cost overview of the shopping mall​
  • Review Booklet with Plan/Actuals details​

Link to demo video: https://dam.sap.com/mac/download/ap/j95i3te?rc=10&doi=SAP1207364 

How to get ​

Planon Real Estate Management for SAP S/4HANA is an SAP Endorsed App and available on the SAP Store. An SAP Endorsed App is a third-party solution that has been certified and specially approved by SAP for its high quality, performance, and ability to meet specific customer needs within the SAP ecosystem. These apps go beyond standard SAP certification and are considered “top-tier” solutions in the SAP Store.​

As a third-party partner solution, it is sold by Planon. Planon is also responsible for the maintenance and operation of the solution.​

Deployment and Releases​

The integration between SAP and Planon is available for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAPS/4HANA.​

Minimum Releases are:​

  • SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud: 2402​
  • SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud: 2023, FPS 1​
  • SAP S/4HANA On Premise: 2023, FPS 1​

Please be aware, that for new features a higher release might be required (see SAP help for more details).

Update for SAP Flexible Real Estate Management (RE-FX) ​

The functions of the component SAP RE-FX (Flexible Real Estate Management) are divided into two areas:​

  • SAP Contract and Lease Management: ​

This capability mainly includes contract management, contract accounting, condition adjustment, sales-based rent, contract valuation, and contract-specific standard reporting. ​

In addition, SAP Contract and Lease Management also includes the new functions developed for the integration with Planon, such as Usable Object, Rentable Object, Cost Settlement and Cost Allocation. These features are available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP S/4HANA .​

  • RE-FX functions for Real Estate Management: ​

This capability comprises the "old" real estate master data of the architectural and usage view (business entity, and so on) and the processes belonging to these objects, such as service charge settlement, option rate determination, third-party management, room reservation, and continuous occupancy. These features are only available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP S/4HANA.​

SAP strategy regarding use of SAP RE-FX for commercial and corporate real estate management:​

For commercial and corporate real estate business processes, enhancements and new feature development will be focused on the described “way forward” above.​

This means that although SAP RE-FX functions specific to real estate are only available in accordance with SAP Note 2254013, all future innovations (for example, additional AI capabilities, Fiori user interface improvements, SAP Business Data Cloud data products) are planned to be developed for SAP Contract and Lease Management and the integration to Planon.​

SAP strategy regarding use of SAP RE-FX for residential industry in DE, AT, CH​

For this specific industry, customers are advised to use RE-FX with all existing functionalities in accordance with SAP Note 2254013.​

Lease Accounting​

SAP Contract and Lease Management continues to be the strategic SAP solution for processing leasing requirements (IFRS 16, US GAAP 842, etc.) for all types of leased assets; this solution remains a focus of development efforts. ​

​

*************Disclaimer*************​

The information in this blog is confidential and proprietary to SAP and may not be disclosed without the permission of SAP. Except for your obligation to protect confidential information, this blog is not subject to your license agreement or any other service or subscription agreement with SAP. SAP has no obligation to pursue any course of business outlined in this blog or any related document, or to develop or release any functionality mentioned therein.​

This blog is provided without a warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to, the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. This blog is for informational purposes and may not be incorporated into a contract. SAP assumes no responsibility for errors or omissions in this presentation, except if such damages were caused by SAP’s intentional or gross negligence.​

All forward-looking statements are subject to various risks and uncertainties that could cause actual results to differ materially from expectations. Readers are cautioned not to place undue reliance on these forward-looking statements, which speak only as of their dates, and they should not be relied upon in making purchasing decisions.​

************************************​

entry.title: Re: SAC Excel Add-In: VBA Macro to refresh sac table
entry.content:
Hi All,

Its 2025 and we are still struggling with the Refresh of data via Macro in SAC Excel Add-in. I am trying to set filters values using SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER function. Once the filter is in the excel cells I want the Refresh action to run and pull the relevant data for this filter.

My code is something like this:


Range("C5").formula = SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER("Table4", "PROFIT_CENTER","xxxxxx")

Application.Calculate ' Force formula calculation
Call Application.SendKeys("+^%{F5}", True) ' Keystrokes to Refresh all

This is not working and the Data refresh step executes without error but it does nothing.

Any suggestions how to get this to work are welcome.

Thanks & Regards

AG

HongYik

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Meetup Riga - May 29, 2025

entry.title: Creation of migration object for migrating conditions of open purchase orders
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Unfortunately, it is not possible to migrate conditions for open purchase orders using the standard template in the Migration Cockpit. This presents the challenge of creating a custom migration object using the function module BAPI_PO_CHANGE.

Has anyone already gained experience with this and would be willing to share it? Alternative solutions are also very welcome. I am working on an S/4HANA On-Premise system.

Many thanks in advance!
Marco

entry.title: Re: Can't use created Integration Suite capabilities
entry.content: For activation of API you need to go under settings on Integration suite and API's to activate this capabilities

entry.title: How to move or copy Breakdown Categories for Y1 COA to custom COA in SAP Group Reporting

We have created new chart of account as per requirement. Breakdown Categories are COA, Version and Period dependent

How do i move or copy existing/ standard Breakdown Categories from Y1 COA to custom COA in SAP Group Reporting. 

As i can see there are no BDC available when i change Y1 to custom COA.

Thanks,

Niranjan

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Pre-Upgrade Option for Release 2505

entry.title: How can I get the EDoc Generation Type field in the OINV
entry.content:
Hi,

I have some invoices that by mistake the EDoc Generation Type field is "Not Relevant" and others that have "Generate". I need to run a query just with invoice number and the EDoc Generation type field but I cannot find the field in the OINV. With the mouse over the field I can see that the table could be ECM6 but this table is empty.

 

Any idea?

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
@dylan-drummond, @julieplummer20 Sorry guys for the many messages. On Orbstack the Container is starting as well ( MacOS 15.5 and Orbstack 1.10.3). Orbstack is working a much faster during startup (M1 MAX) and resource efficient regarding memory and battery-usage. But might not be the reliable solution compared to docker. Docker has a much broader user base and faster updates/reactions regarding changes of Mac OS / Rosetta. 
Anyway I will continue to work with orbstack and give it a try. Keep you updated. 

Enjoy your weekend and bests Tom

entry.title: Schedule Order standard service in DMC
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are using DMC standard "Schedule Order" service to schedule specific order based on planned start / end date. 

When we try to use this service after updating the routing (using standard Update Routing service), it does not worked. It says that "Order could not be found for scheduling". 

Although it is working perfectly without update the routing in DMC. 

Below is sample example - 

Issue – When we update the routing in DMC system using standard Update Routing service, it does not allow us to schedule the order using “Schedule Order Schedules” service after that. It gives an error as “5317315 Order could not be found for scheduling”.

Below times in CET timezone -

Order – 5317315 - Order schedule is also showing blank start and end dates -

SAP Digital Manufacturing @Manoel

entry.title: SAC: Data Action to Enrich Information
entry.content:
Hi experts
Is it possible to copy certain data in specific rows using a DataAction? For example adding the cost center and company for each employee and period.

Any assistance would be highly appreciated.

Many Thanks,

Ioana

entry.title: IRPA - count unique values in array
entry.content:
Hi, I am using activity get values (cells). This gives list of values. Using this variable and embedding it with ".length" it gives number of values. But how to count unique values? IRPA suggest things like ".count" or ".unique" but it gives empty result. I have also tried to use custom script like this one:

const arr = RunID;
function countUniqueArray(arr) {
const Result = [];
arr.forEach(item => {
if (!Result.includes(item)) {
Result.push(item);
}
});
return Result.length;
}

return(countUniqueArray(arr));

But issue is:

1) when RunID (returned values from excel) are passed directly, counting of unique values does not work and gives only total number of items correctly, but not unique values

2) when insted of RunID I hard code something like ["apple", "banana", "apple", "orange"] it works correctly and returns 3

So either change input to something like in 2) (but how) or use some javascript function directly in one of the steps.

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning Hub Enablement Sessions - New webinars starting 29 May 2025
entry.content:
Hi @grant_boreham,

Thank you so much for your warm welcome for the upcoming sessions.
Since you have asked me for suggestion, we could also add some topics which are below which was running in my head up as I am researching from my end.

1) Basics of SAP and understanding what are all the modules available in it.
2) Why SAP is needed in this digital world? 
3) What is the future of SAP in the next 10-15 years keeping in mind of AI and in general?
4) Which SAP modules would be very much in demand especially in the coming years? So people can have a roadmap and a finite timeline to reach their goals accordingly.

P.S: I am completely new to SAP but all I have is only interest, passion and enthusiasm to learn it. For a person like me, these kind of topics or questions would add so much value and clear a lot of things running in my head.

Thanks in advance if you can add these in the upcoming sessions.

Best Regards
Arun

entry.title: Re: IRPA - count unique values in array
entry.content:
ah, just found that devil in the detail - output has to be set in format like below:

Then it works in the script above. However I am still curious if this can be made easier? for stepX.returnedValues I see also function like "CountUniqueArray" however it also gives no result like {}

entry.title: Re: SAP API OData Security Part III – OAuth2.0 Authorization Code Flow
entry.content:
Hi Ramin,

I doubt if its possible as it defeats the purpose of OAuth. OAuth by definition needs an account to be present in Service Provider application.

In real world application say xyz if you notice - whenever you authenticate xyz application via google or any other OAuth provider, first xyz application grabs neccessary details from google like email id, name or any other attribute and then xyz application creates such identity in its DB and then it lets you authenticate. Ultimately user must exist in xyz application before a successfull authentication.

entry.title: Webclient UI API UDOFrom Grid setValue and getValue for a Cell
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I facing with a problem when I try to setValue and getValue for a UDOForm Grid items. Base on the sample from UI API Reference I can reach the Grid but setting and getting value for a cell was not possible.

My codes are next:

const oGrid = await oView.Grid("UDO_GRID_@UDO1");
await oGrid.setTitle("Grid Testing"); // THIS WORKING
const index = 0;
const oRow = await oGrid.Row(index);
const oCell = await oRow.Input("COLUMN_UDO_GRID_@UDO1_UDF_@UDO1_U_Dscription_PROPERTY");
await oCell.setValue("TEST VALUE"); // THIS NOT WORKING
console.log(await oGrid.getTitle());
await oRow.focus();
var sValue = await oCell.getValue();
console.log("value: " + sValue);
 
Anyone knows how can I do that properly?
 
Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: How to include ‘Data Action’ step if user click the ‘...
entry.content:
Hi @JefB

Thank you for your message.

Just looking Revert button (with scripting).

 var planVersion = Table_1.getPlanning().getPublicVersion("Plan"); if (planVersion) { if(planVersion.isDirty()) { planVersion.revert(); }; };

Users are editing the public version, so it will create Public Edit versions. In script should I need to find the relevant user public edit version to Revert, or system will take care it only Revert the changes by same user and not for any other user changes.

For, ex, two users are editing public version, by different company codes CC1, CC2. If user1 edited CC1 data and he wants Revert his changes. If he uses do Revert button using above code, will it Revert all changes including other user2 changes in CC2 data or his changes only.

There is no issue if it Revert data only for same user changes.

If not how to adjust the above code to Revert data only for same user changes.

Sorry, if it is silly doubt. Regards, Vasu

entry.title: Re: Multiple business volume selection in condition contract settlement
entry.content: @ygongalov : did you manage to meet this requirement using additional business volume tables and selection groups?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance (IAG) Overview and Updates
entry.content: How to integrate IAG with S/4 HANA Public cloud? Also how administration happens withinn IAG

entry.title: Data Purging Process in BW4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to purge the data in all adso's with retention period of 15 yrs.

For ADSO with time char, came across below option to design a solution for purging the data.

Option:

  1. Create a config table with ADSO names, Time char and org units. Creating an org table to maintain its values( If available, Cocode, Plant)
  2. Write an ABAP or AMDP program considering the above two tables data and system date for  deriving  period.
  3. Maintaining a log table to track deletion of ADSO data.
  4. Calling the program in Process chain to execute as a yearly activity.

Note: Stored procedure option is not preferred in our case as all jobs are scheduled in Process chains.

Could you please assist or help if above option is ok or is there any other better option available for better and efficient way. we have around 200 ADSOs to purge now.

Thanks,

Shyamala.

entry.title: Re: Event when Workitem is generated for a User
entry.content: Workflow debug was difficult some time ago. It's easier now with SWW_BREAKPOINT.

entry.title: Re: Build Apps Issue

For image, we still dont have any workaround. Is it the image url is https which is creating the issue ? Just to add if we upload a static image, it opens up the image successfully.

entry.title: Re: How can you create a Story Report that shows who has and doesn't have individual goals?
entry.content: I did it in this way: IF(ISNULL([Goal Management#Primary Goal Fields#Goal ID]),"No Goals" ,"Min 1 Goal" )

entry.title: Hello SAP Community!

entry.title: Unable to Post Goods Receipt for a Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am following the test script of Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer (5HP) but I couldn't proceed with the step of Post Goods Receipt with error message below:

No goods receipt possible for purchasing document 4500000857 10

Message no. M7036

I have checked my PO that the Inbound Delivery has appear as a confirmation.

Besides, I ensured the material master and plant data was mapped and I have no issue when carry out another testing of Basic Intercompany Stock Transfer using the same set of data. advanced intercompany

Could you please advise on this?

Link to test script: Process Navigator - SAP for Me

Thank you in advanced!

entry.title: Error in transfer to billing
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm facing the error as follow:

Service contract is released. When in CRMS4_BIL_BDR_GEN to generate BDR, no error was showed but no BDR was created either. Then billing status in billing plan showed "Error in transfer to billing".

Does anyone have any suggestions as to what went wrong?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: No cache region displays in SAP cloud commerce
entry.content:
Just set the property below to true

regioncache.stats.enabled=true

entry.title: Re: Error in Transformation Flow when using a remote table.
entry.content:
Found a solution in making the remote table a local table with a dataflow and then sharing the table to other spaces.

The specified table was one that has not yet a delta-cds-enabled on it, so bottom line, finally it would go anyway into a local table.

So problem solved.

entry.title: How to check all active employees are assigned a valid manager without manager cycle risk ?
entry.content:
Check Tool is having a validation tool to verify manager validity : 

UserWithExistingActiveManager

Unfortunately the program runs 1 single user at a time.

is there an other way for the system to perform manager hierarchy check for the whole active population ? 

not just one employee at a time

entry.title: Sick Leave and Family Responsibility Leave for new employees
entry.content:
Good day all, trust you are well. It is my first time having to do such config, more familiar with Creating Public Holidays. But have to assist with a Time Query from client.

The Client, requires that new Team members acquire 1 day for every 26 days worked in the first 6 months, thereafter they are entitled to 30 days for 3 years.

The same goes for family responsibility leave – team members are only entitled to the 3 days family responsibility leave after 4 months of employment.

 

Please guide me on how to do this config.

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Calling the Sales Order (A2X) OData V4 API from BTP Using a Service Consumption Model
entry.content:
Hi Jürgen,

Sales Order (A2X) ODATA V4 API does not support draft, but you can try Sales Order - Simulate (A2X, OData V2) API if it meets your requirements.

Best Regards,

Katsiaryna

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Stock Room Management in a nutshell
entry.content:
Hello Venkatesh,

The WM config implementation guide applies for stock room management - same SPRO is applicable.

entry.title: Automate User Assignment in Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Introduction

Digital Manufacturing (DM) plays a pivotal role for various personas on the shopfloor. During the implementation phase, primary users typically include Power Users like Manufacturing Admins and Production Engineers. However, as we prepare for the go-live stage, onboarding Production Operators and Production Supervisors becomes crucial.

This onboarding process involves several essential steps: setting up system access, assigning appropriate authorizations, and ensuring organizational alignment with plants and work centers.

In my previous blog User Onboarding, I provided an overview of these steps. In this post, I'll share a sample application demonstrating how you can use Public APIs provided by Digital Manufacturing to automate user assignment to plants and work centers.

Background

I am not a professional developer. I created this sample application for two purposes:

  1. To provide an example implementation for automation.
  2. To challenge myself and learn how AI tools can support me along the way.

The result? A functional sample application, now available on GitHub https://github.com/SAP-samples/digital-manufacturing-extension-samples/tree/main/dm-sidebyside-extension/SideBySide_userAssignmentApp 😊.

Regarding AI support, I was amazed at how well it worked! However, some basic knowledge is necessary to ask the right questions and interpret responses accurately. And when things get tricky or errors arise, having a knowledgeable colleague like Vivekananda Panigrahy can make all the difference. Thanks a lot, Vivek!

User Story

As an administrator, I want to:

  • Easily assign multiple production operators to plants and work centers.
  • Define template users with predefined certifications and work centers that can be used to create production operators.
  • Import initial user data via a CSV file.

Sample Solution

Master Data - Template user

In this sample I have created two users which I use to define certain user groups which can than be used as template to create the actual users.

  • UG_OP_PRODUCE
  • UG_OP_PACKING

The difference between them lies in their assigned Work Centers and a dummy certification, which I have assigned using the user ID. This certification allows me to easily identify the relationship between the created users and the user group used for their creation. 

Additionally, I created a UG_ALL user, which includes all user groups as supervised users. This makes it easy to retrieve all user groups defined in a plant.

 

Custom App

To build the application I used the approach of a side-by-side extension using SAP UI5 and public User APIs  provided by SAP DM https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_user/resource/User

The application consists of three main steps.

  • Upload user data
  • Retrieve and select a user group
  • Creation of the user

Step 1: Upload user

You can browse for the CSV file containing the users and upload it.

I followed the implementation logic outlined in this blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/creation-of-dynamic-table-with-csv-xlsx-files-using-file-upload-in-sap-ui5/ba-p/13478701, though I simplified it to focus on CSV format only.

The CSV file is very basic and only includes Email, First Name and Last Name.

A sample CSV file is provided with the sample code under the resources folder.

Step2: Retrieve and select the user group

In this step, the user group that should serve as a template is retrieved and selected. First the user needs to to enter:

  • The plant name.
  • The UG_ALL user (which contains all user groups).

 All the user groups assigned are listed and once one user group is selected from the result list the details of the user group is displayed to allow reviewing the details.

To retrieve the user groups, I call the Public API https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_user/path/getSupervisorsUsingGET_1 with the user UG_ALL.

The API returns the list of supervised users, which in this setup represents the different user groups available within a plant. To display the details I call the Public API https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_user/path/getUserUsingGET_1.

Step 3: Create users

Once the user data has been uploaded and the template user group selected, the creation of new users—including certification and work center assignments—can be triggered.

For user creation, I call API https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_user/path/createUserUsingPOST_1

Note: If a user already exists in DM, the creation process will fail due to an error. To handle this, you can modify the program logic to allow either creation or update based on user input.

For updating users, use: https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_user/path/updateUserUsingPATCH_1.

Reporting in DM – Embedded SAC

Why did I assign a certification named after the user group to each user? This trick allows me to easily retrieve users assigned to specific groups using the User Certification Assignment Master Data Object  and display it in a custom dashboard 
Details on the MODs you can find on SAP HELP - https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/insights/usercertification-mdo.

 

Sample code on GitHub

The sample code is published on GitHub SAP-samples/digital-manufacturing-extension-samples.
If you want to use it as a jump start make sure you read the Readme File to adapt the mandatory configurations.

1. Set Up a Destination in Your Subaccount

To call a public API in your coding you first need to setup a destination in your subaccount pointing to the Public API. Details you can find on SAP HELP https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/operations-guide/prepare-for-api-integration

2. Configure the SAP Cloud Application Router (xs-app.json)

In the xs-app.json file the configuration for your SAP Cloud Application Router, which helps route incoming requests within your app, is defined. Make sure it points to the destination you have defined.

3. Adjust environment configuration settings in SAP BTP

Issue: Many modern browsers, including Google Chrome, have tightened restrictions on third-party cookies to improve privacy and security. This can impact authentication flows or application behavior that relies on cookies for session management Solution: Navigate to the SAP BTP Space where your application is deployed. Locate your environment configuration settings. Add or modify the variable: COOKIE_BACKWARD_COMPATIBILITY=true This instructs SAP BTP to maintain compatibility with older cookie behavior, helping resolve login and session issues.

For more details I suggest investigating on the internet as I am not the expert.

Conclusion

The current version of Digital Manufacturing and the available Public APIs for Users allows you to easily automate the organizational assignment of users to work centers.

This sample application on GitHub serves as a jump-start for creating custom-tailored solutions, whether for integration with third-party tools, adding approval workflows, or refining user assignment strategies.

If you try this approach, let me know your experiences!

entry.title: Re: Unable to Post Goods Receipt for a Advanced Intercomp...
entry.content:
Check the Value Chain Monitoring app and make sure that the transfer of control was already posted from sending company code to receiving company code.

"transfer of control date" is a field in the outbound delivery header (tab shipment).

Only when the goods have been transferred to the receiving company code, you can post goods receipt in the plant.

In addition, check if the posting periods are open (transaction MMPV).

entry.title: Re: Avoid using deprecated SAP Gateway APIs in your OData service implementation
entry.content: Great work nabi. this blog is full of information

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning Hub Enablement Sessions - New webinars starting 29 May 2025
entry.content:
Hi @grant_boreham ,

Thank you for the opportunity to share suggestions for future webinar topics.

Coming from an academic background where structured mentoring played a key role in my growth, I have truly seen how impactful it can be—both in building confidence and navigating complex ecosystems. When I transitioned into SAP, I noticed that such mentoring activities were not as visible or accessible, especially given the vast scope of SAP's departments, modules, and learning paths.

I believe a session on "Mentoring in the SAP Ecosystem" could be highly beneficial. It could explore topics like:

  • How to find or become a mentor within the SAP Learning community
  • Building peer support networks across different SAP roles and modules
  • Sharing success stories from mentees/mentors
  • Tips for navigating SAP career paths through guided mentoring

This could especially help new professionals and career changers feel more connected and supported as they grow within the SAP landscape.

Thank you again for organizing this valuable series, and I hope this idea resonates with the goals of SAP Learning.

Best regards,

Folake

entry.title: Re: How to include ‘Data Action’ step if user click the ‘...
entry.content: A public version in 'edit mode' gets created per user, so Revert action only impacts edits of that user (non-published changes). Only when publishing, changes of the user are merged with the public version visible to other users.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello everyone! Happy to join this community.

I'm Vitor, based in Brazil, and I currently lead global partner enablement for SAP SuccessFactors HCM solutions. Looking forward to connecting and collaborating with you all!

entry.title: Re: No goods receipt date in LS24 after stock transfer be...
entry.content: It was indeed this setting in hte movement type. Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: how to trigger staple functionality in local printer...
entry.content:
Dear Ganeshmasne,

When printing via S/4HANA Public Cloud no printer specific settings (like stapling or duplex) can be used by default. The reason for this is that in cloud-printing the printer is not known to the S/4HANA system and both operate in different networks. To bridge from the S/4HANA system to the printer, a print client (default SAP Cloud Print Manager - CPM) has to be used. The physical printer is hence only known to the print client. Partners might offer print clients with more capabilities. 

Regards,

Markus

entry.title: How to implement SLP in a new organization?
entry.content:
I want to learn the implementation of SLP module for a new organization.

What are the steps and how we can do?

entry.title: Re: Can the service bundle be pre-configured with specifi...
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, in the Service scope 3D2 for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, it is possible to predefine the materials for service bundles. This ensures that users do not need to manually create material entries each time a service bundle is selected. Service bundles consist of a main item and one or more subitems, which can include service products, service parts, and expense items. Service - Service Bundles The service bundle can be configured to automatically include the predefined materials as part of the subitems linked to the main bundle item. This setup not only saves time but also standardizes the offerings provided to customers and aids in quick service processing. More detailed configuration and handling of service bundles can be found in the specific documentation on service bundles.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: ITSM dispatcher role loading too slow
entry.content: Itsm dispatcher role getting slow rest of other roles working fine

entry.title: Re: webi Export to excel error using SDK
entry.content: This is a rather old post but I am on 4.3 SP4 and experiencing exactly the same behaviour with the same rnadom restarts and the exact same error message. The only difference is that we don't use SDK but REST API and we don't see an error in Tomcat.

entry.title: Re: How to automatically block for payment a document reo...
entry.content:
Hello Tasm, below are BADI's available in FF.5. Try if last 2 can work in your case.

BADIDescription 
EB_BADIModification of Posting Data in the Bank Statement
IEB_CHANGE_BS_DATAChange the Bank Data Storage before the Interpretation Alg.
IEB_CHANGE_STATEMNTChange Total Bank Statement According to Interpretation
IEB_GET_BANK_STMTS_XProcessing of Bank Statements in Format X (XML or Bank-Spec
IEB_MAPPING_XBAdI: Mapping the Bank Statement to Internal Structures
IEB_RET_CHANGE_DOCReturned Debit Memo/Bank Statement:Change of Opened Document
IEB_RETURNS_ADDINCustomer Addin - Returns in Bank Statement

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Quotation Balance Not Reflecting When User Uses the q...
entry.content: Without sharing the screen shot, it is very difficult to understand your issue.  When you say open quantity is not copied to sales order, did you check whether already a sales order is created with the same quotation?  Please share the screen shot of document flow for that line item for better understanding.

entry.title: Re: Populate default value in custom field added in Servi...
entry.content:
Hello,

To default a custom field value in the service order header and ensure it's populated during editing, you need to modify your implementation of the CRMS4_SERV_CUST_H_MODIFY BAdI. Here's how to address the issue:

  1. Correct the BAdI implementation:

    • Remove the statement serviceheader_extension_out = serviceheader_extension_in from your BAdI implementation .
    • This statement overwrites your new values with the old ones, preventing your custom logic from taking effect.

  2. Implement the correct logic:

    • In the BAdI method, assign your desired default value directly to the corresponding field in the serviceheader_extension_out structure .

  3. Ensure the BAdI is called during editing:

    • The BAdI should be triggered both when creating and editing service orders.
    • Double-check your BAdI implementation to ensure it's properly registered and activated.

  4. Consider using the SERVICE_TRANSACTION_CHECK BAdI:

    • If the CRMS4_SERV_CUST_H_MODIFY BAdI is still not triggered during editing, you may need to use the SERVICE_TRANSACTION_CHECK BAdI.
    • This BAdI allows you to check and modify service order data before saving.

  5. Verify custom field properties:

    • Ensure that the custom field properties are set correctly in the BAdI implementation.
    • The CRMS4_SERV_CUST_H_MODIFY BAdI is specifically designed to set field properties for extension fields at the solution order header level.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Failed to resolve API Key variable request.header.apikeysteps.oauth.v2.FailedToResolveAPIKey
entry.content:
Despite of correct APIKey I am facing the same error.

{
"fault": {
"faultstring": "Failed to resolve API Key variable request.header.APIKey",
"detail": {
"errorcode": "steps.oauth.v2.FailedToResolveAPIKey"
}
}
}

entry.title: Why is the COGS Third Party 5030200 standard YCOA account is set up as not relevant for tax?
entry.content:
Hello!

During supplier invoice creation (App: Create Supplier Invoice) we get this error message that the account.

I understand the message and I know how to solve it. I just don't know why is this account set up like this by standard? What is the reason/logic behind this? Why is this (and most of the 5* accounts) set up as not relevant for taxes?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Consume ABAP RFC Function Modules in CAP
entry.content: Can you try by creating a new Space in Build code?

entry.title: Compounded key value in AFO BOBJ report output
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We use BOBJ reports based on AFO(Analysis for Office) and these reports are based on CDS views in SAP. We have recently upgraded our S4 system to 2023 version and post upgrade, we started seeing compounded values for some of the fields in the BOBJ output.
In the output of the report, we use formula SAPLISTOFEFFECTIVEFILTERS to display the filters that are used to run the query and in this, post upgrade we are getting compounded values(Combination of all key fields in corresponding table) instead of single values(Specific field value).
Have you come across this situation. If yes, can you please guide how to avoid this and show single values.
In below screenshot, Main transaction should show 0040, instead it is compounding with another key field from the table Application area which always has value 'R'.

Thank you,

Amarendra.
